title: Fresh 3D Mooshroom Details addon
description: This pack adds 3D mushrooms to the Mooshroom from Fresh Animations: Details!
body:
**ENG:**
**Optifine or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) is required!**
- This pack adds 3D mushrooms to the Mooshroom from [Fresh Animation: Details](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-details)!
- And also custom 3D mushroom models with support for emissive textures. This requires a [Glowtone](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowtone) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).

_I needed cows with 3D mushrooms and support for [Fresh Animation: Details](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-details). I searched everywhere and couldn't find anything, so I had to do it myself!_

**RU:**
**Optifine или [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) необходимы!**
- Этот пак добавляет 3D грибы для грибной коровы из пака [Fresh Animation: Details](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-details)!
- А ещё кастомные 3D модели грибов с поддержкой светящихся текстур, но для их работы нужны [Glowtone](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowtone) или [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).

_Мне были нужны коровы с 3D грибами и поддержка [Fresh Animations: Details](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-details). Я искала везде и ничего не смогла найти, поэтому мне пришлось сделать это самой!_
